Rating","img":null},{"href":"/locals/becky-ngu-hanh-son-vietnam-9841281","text":"Becky

Ngũ Hành Sơn

€20/h

A country, in addition to famous places, they have other places where only locals know. And me the one who will show you that. We will explore the land where I live, eat local food and experience the lives of the Vietnamese, listen to the stories of people here together. Besides Danang, I can travel with you to other cities such as Hoi An ancient town, Hue city. Let's make great memories together
